Legal

Terms of Service

Starter terms for a small custom 3D printing business. This page should be reviewed and tailored to the actual business, jurisdiction, warranty position, and order workflow before launch.

Effective date: April 28, 2026

These Terms of Service govern the use of this website and any custom 3D printing services provided by [Insert legal business name]. By using the site, submitting a quote request, or placing an order, you agree to these terms.

Services

The business provides custom 3D printing services for prototypes, replacement parts, hobby projects, small-batch parts, and related custom jobs, subject to equipment limits, material availability, and job suitability.

Quotes And Orders

  • All pricing is provided by quote unless otherwise stated in writing.
  • Quotes may depend on file review, material selection, quantity, finish, and delivery requirements.
  • A quote does not become a binding order until the business confirms acceptance and any required payment terms are met.
  • Quoted lead times are estimates unless explicitly guaranteed in writing.

Customer Files And Responsibilities

  • The customer is responsible for confirming that uploaded files, measurements, and project requirements are accurate.
  • The customer is responsible for ensuring they have the right to submit any model, drawing, logo, or design for printing.
  • The business may refuse jobs that appear unsafe, infringing, unlawful, or technically unsuitable.

Print Variance And Expectations

3D printing is a manufacturing process with practical tolerances and visible process characteristics. Layer lines, support marks, minor surface variation, and reasonable dimensional variance may occur depending on geometry, material, and finish level.

Customers should identify any critical dimensions, load requirements, or appearance requirements before production begins.

Material And Use Limitations

Printed parts may not be suitable for every use. Unless specifically agreed in writing, printed parts are not certified for medical, aerospace, life-safety, or other high-liability applications.

Placeholder for legal review: [Insert any additional prohibited or restricted use language].

Payment

Payment terms, deposit requirements, and accepted payment methods should be stated here. If partial payment, prepayment, or custom invoicing is required, that should be made explicit before launch.

Placeholder for legal review: [Insert payment terms, taxes, and late-payment language].

Cancellations, Changes, And Reprints

  • Orders may not be cancellable once printing or material preparation has begun.
  • Design changes after quote approval may require a revised quote and schedule.
  • Any reprint or refund policy should be clearly defined here, including how fit or quality claims are reviewed.

Placeholder for legal review: [Insert final cancellation, refund, and reprint terms].

Shipping And Pickup

Delivery dates are estimates unless specifically guaranteed. Risk of loss and ownership transfer terms should be clarified here, especially for shipped orders versus local pickup.

Intellectual Property

Customers retain ownership of their submitted designs except to the extent required for the business to review, quote, print, package, and deliver the order. The business retains ownership of its website content, branding, and internal manufacturing methods.

Limitation Of Liability

To the maximum extent allowed by law, the business should limit liability for indirect, incidental, special, and consequential damages. Liability caps and disclaimers should be reviewed by counsel before launch.

Placeholder for legal review: [Insert final limitation of liability and disclaimer language].

Governing Law

These terms should specify the governing law and venue: [Insert state or jurisdiction].

Changes To These Terms

The business may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Updated terms should be posted on this page with a revised effective date.

Contact

Questions about these Terms of Service should be directed to: [Insert legal business contact details].

Forgefront 3D

Fast, practical 3D printing for replacement parts, prototypes, custom jobs, and small batches. Built for customers who want clear answers and a real quote without enterprise complexity.

Replace contact details, testimonials, and gallery photos with real business assets before launch.
